name: Trico Marine Services, Inc.
description: Trico Marine Services, Inc. was a provider of subsea and marine support vessels and services to the oil and natural gas exploration and production industry. The company operated a fleet of vessels designed to support various offshore activities, including subsea construction, maintenance, and drilling support. Headquartered in The Woodlands, Texas, Trico Marine Services served clients globally, offering specialized marine solutions tailored to the complex requirements of offshore energy projects. The company eventually filed for bankruptcy and ceased operations as an independent entity following significant financial restructuring.
